<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：This medicinal product is for diagnostic use only. Neuraceq is a radiopharmaceutical indicated for Positron Emission Tomography (PET) imaging of ? amyloid neuritic plaque density in the brains of...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>migraine disorder（99.4%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（99.4%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（99.4%）</li>
<li>migraine with or without aura, susceptibility to（99.1%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（99.0%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（98.9%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（98.8%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（98.8%）</li>
<li>trigeminal autonomic cephalalgia（98.7%）</li>
<li>Raynaud disease（98.7%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（98.7%）</li>
<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（98.5%）</li>
<li>atrophoderma vermiculata（98.5%）</li>
<li>intermittent vascular claudication（98.3%）</li>
<li>peripheral vascular disease（98.3%）</li>
<li>intracranial arteriosclerosis（98.3%）</li>
<li>gastroduodenitis（98.3%）</li>
<li>bronchitis（98.1%）</li>
<li>Monckeberg arteriosclerosis（98.0%）</li>
<li>peptic ulcer disease（97.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
